title: Brenscombe Heath
summary: Brenscombe Heath (grid reference SY985829) is a 34.7 hectare biological Site of Special Scientific Interest in Corfe Castle, Dorset, notified in 1985.
text: Brenscombe Heath (grid reference SY985829) is a 34.7 hectare biological Site of Special Scientific Interest in Corfe Castle, Dorset, notified in 1985.
